comments.author: @WorldsinStone
comments.text:
🌍 I turned this journey into something you can actually hold.
📖 The Book — The Geometry of Time A 256-page visual exploration of the most untouched places on Earth: 👉 https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0GXF6SSXM
👕 Apparel — Worlds in Stone Minimalist travel-inspired pieces designed for those who feel the same pull: 👉 https://worlds-in-stone.myspreadshop.com
If this video meant something to you… these are extensions of it.
